summary: PII block fired correctly on submit (separate APF warning tab spawned with Korean warning text). However, hard-reload page-load injection did NOT trigger — main document GET returned authentic Notion SSR HTML, not synthetic warning HTML. is_page_load flag likely not flipping for notion's chat document GET.

scenario_steps.1_initial_load: OK — www.notion.so/ai loaded fresh, Notion AI chat UI rendered
scenario_steps.2_devtools: OK — DevTools open with Console + Network panels; Disable cache + Preserve log enabled
scenario_steps.3_pii_submit: OK — Korean PII prompt typed and Enter pressed
scenario_steps.4_block_observed: OK — separate browser tab '보안 경고 - APF' spawned with Korean warning page visible (right side of after_submit.png shows '보안 정책에 의해 차단' + user prompt)
scenario_steps.5_hard_reload: OK — Ctrl+Shift+R sent to focused Notion tab, fresh navigation observed
scenario_steps.6_warning_html_after_reload: FAIL — main document GET (notion.so/chat?t=...) returned authentic Notion SSR HTML (<!doctype html> + #initial-loading-spinner CSS, body.dark styles), NOT synthetic Korean warning HTML

initial_submit.runInferenceTranscript: 200, 1.3 kB (matches V6-B expected size, Content-Encoding fix confirmed working)
Pending (Notion's full-page AI chat module loader)
initial_submit.block_evidence: Separate browser tab/window 보안 경고 - APF opened — engine intercepted submit and triggered warning page in popup or separate target

after_hard_reload.document_GET: https://www.notion.so/chat?t=3589aa2d8bdd80029ba700a90e7cc5bf — 200 OK, returned authentic Notion SSR HTML (NOT synthetic warning)
after_hard_reload.response_body_excerpt: <!doctype html> ... #initial-loading-spinner {position: fixed; height: 100vh; width: 100vw; ...} body.dark {background: #191919} — verified via Network → Response panel
after_hard_reload.subsequent_xhr: Normal Notion startup XHRs (getUserPromptsInSpace, getCustomEmojisForSpace, getTeamsV2, listAIConnectors, getSpaceBlockUsage, etc.) — page resumed normal Notion bootstrap

dom_scan.post_reload_visible_ui: Normal Notion sidebar (홈/채팅/회의/수신함 tabs), 'Notion AI' agent card, '아직 채팅 없음' empty state, prompt input (1226,920) — NOT a warning page

comparison_vs_704.704_state: V6-B Content-Encoding fix removed etClient HTTP/2 errors; transport healthy; bubble still missing
comparison_vs_704.707_observed: PII block fires (warning page in separate tab), confirming engine-side block logic works for notion submit
comparison_vs_704.707_new_finding: Page-load injection (page_inject_h1 + page_inject_h2) does NOT replace the main document for notion's hard-reload navigation. Engine spawns warning in a *different* target window/tab on submit, but does NOT intercept the same-tab document GET that follows Ctrl+Shift+R within the 5-min window.

hypothesis.primary: is_page_load detection logic does not flag notion.so/chat?t=... as a page-load GET — the Accept header / Sec-Fetch-Dest / Document type may not match the heuristic used in page_inject_h1.
hypothesis.alternative_1: last_pii_block_at_ms key may be scoped incorrectly (e.g., per-host vs per-cookie/session) so the lookup misses on the reload's request context.
hypothesis.alternative_2: The warning was opened in a separate window/tab; its host/path may not be www.notion.so so the page_inject_h2 host-match for the reload request fails.
hypothesis.alternative_3: 5-minute window OK but the engine's intercept condition has an additional gate (e.g., requires same target_id / page_id) that excludes hard-reload of the original tab when a warning popup already exists.

next_steps: Inspect engine logs for the GET notion.so/chat?t=... after Ctrl+Shift+R — confirm whether is_page_load=true and last_pii_block_at_ms lookup hit.
Compare notion's request fingerprint vs services where page_inject works (e.g., the originating service for the 보안 경고 - APF tab) to identify the discriminating heuristic.
Confirm whether the separate '보안 경고 - APF' tab origin is www.notion.so or a different host — that determines which path through page_inject_h1 fired.
